basic_details.job_title: Tripura High Court – Junior Grade Translator – 5 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tripura High Court Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Junior Grade Translator. Candidates with M.A Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Tripura High Court official website thc.tripura.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in any official language of Tripura with proficiency in English OR Masters Degree in English with proficiency in any official language of Tripura. Proficiency in computer use is necessary. Law Graduate will be given due weightage.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.5700-24000/- with Grade Pay Rs.4200/- (Revised to Level-10)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Tripura High Court Junior Grade Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
